# sf-llms-context

> Curated Salesforce knowledge for AI coding agents. Prevents LLMs from generating deprecated patterns.
> Current: Summer '26 | API v67.0

## Core — Read These First

- [Deprecated Patterns](patterns/deprecated.md): What AI must NOT generate — deprecated Salesforce patterns with correct alternatives
- [Governor Limits](limits/governor-limits.md): Current governor limit numbers — reference before generating any Apex code

## Best Practices

- [Apex Best Practices](patterns/apex-best-practices.md): Current Apex patterns — triggers, bulkification, async, testing, security
- [SOQL Best Practices](patterns/soql-best-practices.md): Selective filters, bind variables, User Mode, relationship queries, cursors
- [LWC Best Practices](patterns/lwc-best-practices.md): Lightning Data Service, lwc:if, lwc:ref, custom events, LMS, GraphQL
- [Flow Best Practices](patterns/flow-best-practices.md): Record-Triggered Flow patterns, before-save vs after-save, fault paths, subflows

## Full Context

- [Complete Reference](llms-full.txt): All content concatenated in priority order — single fetch for full context
